languages.text: {n}Батошски выглядит обманчиво расслабленным, однако его зеленые глаза ловят каждое движение на мостике. Когда тяжелый взгляд полковника падает на какого-то блюстителя, тот ощутимо ежится.{/n} "Лорд-капитан. Вокруг очень много людей. Некоторые только делают вид, что заняты. Мы это поправим. Позже".

{n}Batoshski appears deceptively at ease, but his green eyes track every motion across the bridge. When the colonel fixes a heavy stare on an enforcer, the subordinate noticeably flinches.{/n} "Lord Captain. There are far too many people around. Some are only pretending to be busy. We will take care of that. In due time."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски выглядит обманчиво расслабленным, однако его зеленые глаза ловят каждое движение на мостике. Когда тяжелый взгляд полковника падает на какого-то блюстителя, тот ощутимо ежится.{/n} "Лорд-капитан. Вокруг очень много людей. Некоторые только делают вид, что заняты. Мы это поправим. Позже".

When the colonel fixes a heavy stare on an enforcer, the subordinate noticeably flinches.{/n} "Lord Captain. There are far too many people around. Some are only pretending to be busy. We will set it right. In due time."

{n}Batoshski appears deceptively at ease, but his green eyes track every motion across the bridge. When the colonel fixes a heavy stare on an enforcer, the subordinate noticeably flinches.{/n} "Lord Captain. There are far too many people around. Some are only pretending to be busy. We will take care of that. In due time."

{n}Batoshski looks like a caged animal — he glances around warily, his face twisted in a bewildered scowl.{/n} "You caught me unawares, Lord Captain. It will not happen again. I just need to get to grips with... this place. It's too unfamiliar."

{n}Batoshski appears deceptively at ease, but his green eyes track every motion across the bridge. When the colonel fixes a heavy stare on an enforcer, the subordinate noticeably flinches.{/n} "Lord Captain. There are far too many people around. Some are only pretending to be busy. We will set it right. In due time."

{n}Batoshski appears deceptively at ease, but his green eyes track every motion across the bridge. When the colonel fixes a heavy stare on an enforcer, the subordinate noticeably flinches.{/n} "Lord Captain. There are far too many people around. Some are only pretending to be busy. We will take care of that. In due time."

languages.text: バトシュスキーは檻に入れられた動物のように、警戒しながら周囲を見回し、困惑したような苦い顔をしている。 「お気づきになられたとは、申し訳ございません。二度とございません。ただ、この場所を理解する必要があるのです。あまりにも馴染みがないのです」
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks like a caged animal — he glances around warily, his face twisted in a bewildered scowl.{/n} "You caught me unawares, Lord Captain. It will not happen again. I just need to get to grips with... this place. It's too unfamiliar."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski, aldatıcı bir şekilde rahat görünüyor ama yeşil gözleri köprüdeki her hareketi takip ediyor. Albay gözlerini bir infazcıya diktiğinde astın belirgin bir şekilde irkildiği görülüyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan. Etrafta çok fazla insan var. Bazıları sadece meşgulmüş gibi yapıyor. Bununla ilgileneceğiz. Vakti gelince."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski appears deceptively at ease, but his green eyes track every motion across the bridge. When the colonel fixes a heavy stare on an enforcer, the subordinate noticeably flinches.{/n} "Lord Captain. There are far too many people around. Some are only pretending to be busy. We will take care of that. In due time."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski, aldatıcı bir şekilde rahat görünüyor ama yeşil gözleri köprüdeki her hareketi takip ediyor. Albay gözlerini bir infazcıya diktiğinde astın belirgin bir şekilde irkildiği görülüyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan. Etrafta çok fazla insan var. Bazıları sadece meşgulmüş gibi yapıyor. Bununla ilgileneceğiz. Vakti gelince."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基看似一副漫不经心的样子，但他那双绿眼睛正紧盯着舰桥上的每一丝动静。当上校将沉重的目光锁定一名执法者时，那名下属明显瑟缩了一下。{/n}“舰长大人。这里人太多了，其中有些人只是假装很忙。等时机合适，我们会处理的。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski appears deceptively at ease, but his green eyes track every motion across the bridge. When the colonel fixes a heavy stare on an enforcer, the subordinate noticeably flinches.{/n} "Lord Captain. There are far too many people around. Some are only pretending to be busy. We will take care of that. In due time."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基看似一副漫不经心的样子，但他那双绿眼睛正紧盯着舰桥上的每一丝动静。当上校将沉重的目光锁定一名执法者时，那名下属明显瑟缩了一下。{/n}“舰长大人。这里人太多了，其中有些人只是假装很忙。等时机合适，我们会处理的。”

languages.text: {n}Batoshski wirkt gelassen, aber seine grünen Augen erfassen jede Bewegung auf der Brücke. Als der Blick des Colonels auf einen Enforcer fällt, zuckt dieser sichtlich zusammen.{/n} "Lord Captain. Hier sind deutlich zu viele Leute. Einige tun nur so, als wären sie beschäftigt. Wir regeln das. Zu gegebener Zeit."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski appears deceptively at ease, but his green eyes track every motion across the bridge. When the colonel fixes a heavy stare on an enforcer, the subordinate noticeably flinches.{/n} "Lord Captain. There are far too many people around. Some are only pretending to be busy. We will take care of that. In due time."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski wirkt gelassen, aber seine grünen Augen erfassen jede Bewegung auf der Brücke. Als der Blick des Colonels auf einen Enforcer fällt, zuckt dieser sichtlich zusammen.{/n} "Lord Captain. Hier sind deutlich zu viele Leute. Einige tun nur so, als wären sie beschäftigt. Wir regeln das. Zu gegebener Zeit."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski semble étonnamment calme, mais il scrute tout ce qu'il se passe sur la passerelle de ses yeux verts. Lorsque le colonel pose son regard sur un prévôt, celui-ci tressaille.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}. Cet endroit fourmille de gens. Certains font mine d'être occupés. Nous nous en occuperons... En temps voulu. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski appears deceptively at ease, but his green eyes track every motion across the bridge. When the colonel fixes a heavy stare on an enforcer, the subordinate noticeably flinches.{/n} "Lord Captain. There are far too many people around. Some are only pretending to be busy. We will take care of that. In due time."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski semble étonnamment calme, mais il scrute tout ce qu'il se passe sur la passerelle de ses yeux verts. Lorsque le colonel pose son regard sur un prévôt, celui-ci tressaille.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}. Cet endroit fourmille de gens. Certains font mine d'être occupés. Nous nous en occuperons... En temps voulu. »

languages.text: {n}Batoshski parece estar engañosamente relajado, pero sus ojos verdes captan todo movimiento en el puente. Cuando el coronel fija una mirada intensa en uno de los guardias, el subordinado se encoge visiblemente.{/n} «Lord Capitán, hay demasiada gente alrededor. Algunos solo fingen estar ocupados. Nos encargaremos de eso... con el tiempo».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski appears deceptively at ease, but his green eyes track every motion across the bridge. When the colonel fixes a heavy stare on an enforcer, the subordinate noticeably flinches.{/n} "Lord Captain. There are far too many people around. Some are only pretending to be busy. We will take care of that. In due time."
